validation_queries.description: All recursive frames were recorded (RECURSION_DEPTH=100 -> 101 frames)
validation_queries.error_message: Expected 101 'recurse' rows: the initial recurse(100) call plus 100 recursive descents. Fewer rows indicate the per-thread region cache is collapsing same-name nested calls.
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name = 'recurse'

validation_queries.description: Each recurse frame has a source_object trace-arg
validation_queries.error_message: Expected one source_object arg per recurse frame (101 total).
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM region_args WHERE name = 'source_object'

validation_queries.description: All source_object args on recurse regions reference the minimal-recursion binary
validation_queries.error_message: Expected every recurse region's source_object to equal 'minimal-recursion'.
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM region_args A INNER JOIN regions R ON R.id = A.id AND R.guid = A.guid WHERE R.name = 'recurse' AND A.name = 'source_object' AND A.value = 'minimal-recursion'
